title: Reviewed candidate-feature dataset format + generator
context: The conflation tool (conflation-008) emits raw candidate detections; this task formalizes the reviewed candidate-feature dataset format and the generator that produces it. The format must make the human-review obligation explicit (humanReviewRequired:true), carry per-feature provenance and confidence, pass through the do-no-harm filter (harm-gate-003), and be licensed ODbL-1.0 as an OSM-derived dataset. The format is the bridge between AI gap detection and human mapping: it is not an OSM-ready upload.
objective: Define and implement the reviewed candidate-feature dataset format (GeoJSON) and a generator that produces ODbL-licensed candidate datasets from conflation-008 output, filtered through the do-no-harm gate.
acceptanceCriteria: Defines an ODbL-licensed candidate-feature format (GeoJSON) with per-feature provenance, confidence score, and a humanReviewRequired:true flag — explicitly not an OSM-ready upload.
Generator passes through the do-no-harm filter: no people-level data; sensitive features are dropped or flagged per harm-gate-003.
outputLicense is ODbL-1.0 (derived from OSM); dataset documents the share-alike obligation in a LICENSE field or accompanying file.
Format and generator are reviewed by the technical reviewer and do-no-harm reviewer.
Ships committed golden fixtures; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint passes green.
resources: PLAN.md — Candidate-list-first decision; Data, licensing section
output: A merged PR defining the reviewed candidate-feature GeoJSON format and generator, licensed ODbL-1.0, with golden fixtures, do-no-harm filtering, and passing CI.
